CREATE TABLE test_indexOf (arr Array(Int32), search_value Int32);
SELECT indexOf([NULL, NULL, NULL], NULL) AS index_all_nulls;
SELECT indexOf([1, 2, 3, 4, NULL, 5], NULL) AS index_null_in_middle;
CREATE TABLE subquery_test (id Int32, arr Array(Int32));
SELECT id, indexOf(arr, 3) FROM subquery_test WHERE indexOf(arr, 3) > 0;
CREATE TABLE multi_table_test (id Int32, arr Array(Int32));
SELECT mt.id, indexOf(mt.arr, st.search_value) FROM multi_table_test mt JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT arr, 2 AS search_value FROM multi_table_test) st ON indexOf(mt.arr, st.search_value) > 0;
